summary: Classified five open PRs independently from the hydrated live inventory. No security-sensitive signals were present, no shared canonical exists, and the job disables merge, fix PR, low-signal closeout, and instant close. Each PR remains open and needs maintainer judgment or author follow-up before any mutating action is safe.

actions.reason: Focused bug-fix PR with mixed/failing gates and no merge/fix authority in this job; maintainer must decide whether to request proof/check refresh or take it forward.
Broad behavior PR with active author update and unresolved check/review readiness questions; maintainer judgment is required before any close, label, or merge-path action.
The PR is not low-signal-close eligible under this job and has author intent plus technical correctness questions; maintainer must decide whether to keep pursuing, ask the author, or close manually.
Comment-only QQBot wording PR has maintainer proof/rebase signal and unresolved check state; maintainer must decide whether the SafeOps proof is enough and whether to refresh the branch.
Useful contributor PR with uneditable branch and unresolved review-readiness questions; maintainer judgment is required before any supersede/repair/merge direction.

needs_human: #80627: maintainer decision needed for focused CLI bug-fix PR with failing proof/check gates and no merge/fix authority in this job.
#81382: maintainer decision needed for broad heartbeat/session-state PR with active author follow-up, proof, and dependency-guard failures.
#82148: maintainer decision needed because author signaled work-management closure while PR remains open, and technical correctness/check state still needs judgment.
#86018: maintainer decision needed on whether SafeOps proof satisfies the requested real-behavior proof and whether the branch must be refreshed.
#51868: maintainer decision needed for useful uneditable contributor PR with hydrated review-bot findings and author request for verdict.
